race.comment: SHAGGY (2) indicated a win was imminent fourth-up when he gripped on with the 57kg for a narrow second over 1100m at Canterbury in BM72 class. Well in with the 3kg claim and will prove hard to run down in this tougher contest. BRYANT (10) progressive gelding who gets the blinkers fitted third-up from sticky gate. Kept finding with the 61kg with a respectable fifth over 1250m at Canterbury. Massive weight drop and doesn't have to improve much to take a hand in the finish. LET'S GO AGAIN (6) proven at this level and the rain will help her cause. Took good late ground off Mal Coupe when second over 1000m at this track. Extra trip in her favour with fitness on her side. ZARAGOZA (4) comes back a level after covering plenty of ground in the run with a plugging eighth over 1200m here in BM78 grade. Will appreciate some sting out of the ground and worth thought. CHANGE MY ADDRESS (12) caught the eye first-up over the unsuitable trip and gets in light with the claim. Value chance.
